name: debug-tools-ai
description: AI agent support package for DebugTools MCP workflows: attach JVMs, inspect connections, generate argsJson templates, and invoke Java methods.

interface.shortDescription: Use DebugTools MCP tools to attach JVMs and invoke Java methods
interface.longDescription: Guides AI agents through DebugTools IntelliJ MCP workflows: list connections, attach JVMs, generate method argsJson templates, and invoke Java methods.
defaultPrompt: Use DebugTools to invoke this Java method.
Attach DebugTools to this JVM and call a method.
